title: Impaled soulfork fix
description:
Mod that adds crafting recipe to soulfork from Impaled

[note] mod does not add ability to create it! It makes it worth more, and easier to see. Originaly you click on any soul block. For example:
soul campfire, soul lamp, soul torch
body: Mod that adds crafting recipe to soulfork from [Impaled](https://modrinth.com/mod/impaled) mod, and adds Ancient soul upgrade creafted from ancient trident
